readings.Aries: You thrive in motion. Today the most important motion is internal. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Taurus: The tension you're feeling is between what you have and what you want. They are not mutually exclusive. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Gemini: You're very good at making things feel lighter. Someone around you needs weight acknowledged, not lifted. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Cancer: What you call home, others call a refuge. You created that. It required sacrifice. Notice both. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Leo: You are visible whether you try to be or not. Make what you're broadcasting intentional. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Virgo: Something you noticed and catalogued weeks ago is relevant now. Your records are good. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Libra: You've been seeing both sides so long you've forgotten which one you were on originally. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Scorpio: There is a desire you've been treating as a threat. It isn't. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Sagittarius: There is wisdom in staying. Not because leaving is wrong — because the lesson is here. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Capricorn: The structure you've built is load-bearing in ways you haven't fully mapped. Don't remove anything without knowing what it supports. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Aquarius: You are ahead of the moment you're in. Come back and meet it. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Pisces: You've been generous with your understanding of others. Apply some to yourself. What worked before will not work the same way this time.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
